findings.detail: Runtime imports: pipeline.position_sizing (compute_position_size, PositionSizeResult), pipeline.pre_trade_checklist (run_pre_trade_checklist, PreTradeReport), pipeline.investigation_loop (HypothesisResult), integrity.input_guard, storage.gate_archiver, storage.archivist, storage.session. Does NOT import gate2 orchestration (run_gate2). Imports Gate2Session from gate2_interaction via try/except with local fallback — this is a DATA TYPE import, not orchestration. No shadow/ imports.

Gate2Session imported via try/except with complete local fallback dataclass. If gate2_interaction.py is broken or missing, gate3 still operates with the fallback — no hard dependency. The fallback duplicates the Gate2Session interface but this is intentional for resilience.

Inputs: Gate2Session (conviction record), hypotheses (HVR results). Outputs: Gate3Session with DecisionTicket and EXECUTED/DEFERRED/CANCELLED outcome. Position sizing computed via compute_position_size(). Pre-trade validation via run_pre_trade_checklist(). Session checkpoint saved. Archive logged. No data flows to shadows.
Single public function: async run_gate3(). Helper functions (_format_*, _parse_*) are module-private.
Hard turn limit of 40 with warning at 30. Deferred state saved if limit reached. No infinite loop.
